$comment: Canonical loom CC automation lane map. SOURCE OF TRUTH: Sources/LoomCore/Control.swift (ControlLanes). Every musical voice port carries the global + per-voice lanes; CC24 rides the drone port only. Values are 7-bit 0-127, sampled 8x per bar; the transport sends only changed values. The loom.amxd device slews these into smooth modulation.

globalLanes.label: Tension
globalLanes.desc: Global conductor arc — the piece's tension over minutes.

globalLanes.label: Filter
globalLanes.desc: Brightness / filter-sweep: opens across a build, snaps wide at the drop, closes through a breakdown.

globalLanes.label: Build
globalLanes.desc: Riser / transition envelope: rises across the whole build, holds through the vacuum, snaps to 0 at the drop.

globalLanes.label: Drop
globalLanes.desc: Impact / downlifter: a falling envelope over the drop and the fall out of a peak.

globalLanes.label: Space
globalLanes.desc: Reverb-wash: swells into vacuums and breakdowns, pulls back in dense peaks.

perVoiceLanes.label: Expression
perVoiceLanes.desc: Voice-specific musical expression arc — differs per port.

droneOnlyLanes.label: Drone swell
droneOnlyLanes.desc: Triangle over the whole drone span, scaled by the drone `swell` param.

expressive.desc: Portamento on (127) at note-on, off (0) at note-off.
Channel pressure / aftertouch on glide notes.
